fills: Tabel 4.6 / T8d (warmed-fair BKT vs HCIE, ASSISTments-2009)
protocol: offline, leak-free (md5(user)%2: half0=train priors, half1=eval), predict-before-observe, per-USER windows, rank-AUC
warmed_definition: BKT P(L0) per concept = train-half base correctness rate (individualized prior); cold BKT uses fixed P(L0)=0.20; P(T)=0.10,P(G)=0.20,P(S)=0.10 identical for both to isolate the warming
hcie_predictor_note: ASSIST-2009 has NO sealed HCIE run (only external_log_attempts); HCIE here = the deployed-readout reconstruction (population prior at first attempt + online Elo/IRT ability tracker, beta frozen from train prior). Same predictor family as probe_coldstart_beat_bkt.
framing: AUC = competitive, not superior. Warmed-BKT is the stronger (fair) baseline; cold-BKT is the floor.
